evals.expected_output: Should classify as Standard tier (single stack TS, 5-20 files, has order-of-operations). Should propose edit permissions for packages/shell/client/ files mentioned in the plan. Should select Lea Verou (CSS/UI domain) + Rich Hickey or Sandi Metz (skeptic). Should flag that bun run test baseline needs recording. Should produce a plan addendum and permission set.

Should classify as Standard tier (single stack Rust, 5-20 files, has order-of-operations and risks section). Should propose edit permissions for server-rs/lantern-auth/ and server-rs/lantern-core/ files. Should select Simon Willison (SQLite domain) + Rich Hickey (skeptic). Should flag the risk about PRAGMA foreign_keys surfacing orphaned rows. Should flag that cargo test baseline needs recording.

Should classify as Heavy tier (cross-stack Rust+TS, >20 files, multiple streams, involves deleting significant code). Should propose broad glob permissions for the streams. Should select 3-4 personas including domain expert and skeptic. Should flag test breakage risk from DQL client deletion and auth gutting. Should produce comprehensive test impact analysis.
